name: river-rat-poker
description: A static Texas hold'em browser game set at a rat-world casino table.

scripts.native:add:android: npm run native:build:web && npx cap add android
scripts.native:add:ios: npm run native:build:web && npx cap add ios
scripts.native:sync: npm run native:build:web && npx cap sync
scripts.native:prepare:ios: npm run native:build:web && npx cap sync ios
scripts.native:open:android: npm run native:sync && npx cap open android
scripts.native:open:ios: npm run native:prepare:ios && npx cap open ios
scripts.native:doctor: npm test && npm run build && npx cap doctor
scripts.native:generate-resources: npx cordova-res --skip-config --copy || echo 'install cordova-res to generate native icons'
